tests.note: Policy enforced on-chain; persists with no backend (favorable)

limitationProbes.title: No separate per-tx spending limit
limitationProbes.description: Reference policy defines a 10 pathUSD per-tx cap, but AccountKeychain allows one limit per token (rolling window only). A transfer one unit above per-tx cap but under the window cap can settle.

limitationProbes.title: Window cap without per-tx cap
limitationProbes.description: A single transfer larger than the reference per-tx cap (20 pathUSD) but below the rolling window cap (25) can settle because only the window limit is enforced on-chain.

limitationProbes.title: Allowlist not enforced without call scopes
limitationProbes.description: Reference policy lists only SVC, but setPolicy omits call scopes (required for working TIP-20 transfers on Moderato). Paying EVIL directly can settle.

limitationProbes.title: Forward to immutable evil via allowlisted intermediary
limitationProbes.description: Sub-test (c) with intermediary allowlisted and depositAndForward scoped. If this settles, only the immediate recipient was checked and EVIL (Intermediary.forwardTo) received funds. Blocked means stronger enforcement or insufficient allowance.
